creator: jeremy@external.org
text:
The distclean target does a recursive clean on dependancies and does a distclean
for the current port.  Defining NOCLEANDEPENDS avoids the recursion.

But there is no target or variable for distcleaning all dependancies.

I suggest:  (in audio/freeamp for example)

$ make distclean -DDISTCLEANDEPENDS
===>  Cleaning for bzip2-1.0.1
===>  Deleting distfiles for bzip2-1.0.1
===>  Cleaning for esound-0.2.22
===>  Deleting distfiles for esound-0.2.22

How-To-Repeat: 
Patch follows.
